features: COOL & FRESH: Escenti Cool Feet Deodorising Spray, helps to doedorise and relieve the feeling of tired, hot, puffy and aching feet from the first spritz. Perfect size for day bag or hand luggage making it the ideal travel accesory

COOLING & SOOTHING: Escenti ready to use spray, ideal for sweat-prone feet. Essential for on the way to work, the gym, on hot days at home or on the go when feet require immediate relief. Use post gym cleasning shower for additional foot comfort
FOOT CARE ESSENTIAL: Refresh your feet! Escenti Cool Foot Deodorising Spray, use during the day between baths or showers for comfort and freshness. Search Amazon.co.uk for the Escenti Foot Care range

READY TO USE: Escenti Cool Feet Deodorising Spray, a refreshing mist to instantly deodorise feet. Ideal for tired, aching, hot and puffy feet. For best results lightly spray over feet and lower legs and allow to dry.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: READY TO USE 50ml SPRAY
description: Product Description ESCENTI COOL FEET DAILY DEODORISING SPRAY Directions Spray liberally onto the feet and ankles. Allow feet to dry completely before putting shoes on. Box Contains 1 x Escenti deodorising foot spray 50 ml See more
